articles.title: Review & setlist: Charlie Puth turns MGM Music Hall into a masterclass in musicianship
articles.description:
The Berklee alum blended jazz, pop, and nostalgia at his “Whatever's Clever! World Tour.”

The post Review & setlist: Charlie Puth turns MGM Music Hall into a masterclass in musicianship appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Charlie Puth performed at MGM Music Hall on May 23, showcasing his musical versatility.
The concert featured a blend of jazz and pop, appealing to diverse Boston audiences.
Local residents enjoyed a high-quality performance, enhancing Boston's vibrant music scene.

articles.title: Review and setlist: Jakob Dylan’s choice to channel Tom Petty pays off at Beverly Wallflowers show
articles.description:
The Wallflowers played their smash hit "Bringing Down the Horse" in full, followed by Petty's "Long After Dark."

The post Review and setlist: Jakob Dylan’s choice to channel Tom Petty pays off at Beverly Wallflowers show appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: The Wallflowers performed 'Bringing Down the Horse' in full at the Cabot Theatre in Beverly.
Jakob Dylan honored Tom Petty by covering 'Long After Dark' during the May 22, 2026 show.
Local residents enjoyed a nostalgic concert experience, celebrating classic rock influences in their community.
